title: centaurea chrysocephala
intro: Centaurea chrysocephala, also known as Yellow Cornflower or Chrysocephalos, is a flowering plant in the daisy family, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and edible seeds. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help soothe digestive issues and wounds. Centaurea chrysocephala is believed to offer several health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating menstrual cramps, and supporting liver function. The seeds and flowers can be used to make herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
